title: banisteriopsis caduciflora
intro: Banisteriopsis caduciflora, also known as chacruna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Banisteriopsis caduciflora include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve mood, and even treat symptoms of depression. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often combined with other ingredients, such as ayahuasca, to create traditional medicines that are used in shamanic rituals and ceremonies.
